nasb.text: But by His doing you are in Christ Jesus, who became to us wisdom from God, and righteousness and sanctification, and redemption,

esv.text: And because of him you are in Christ Jesus, who became to us wisdom from God, righteousness and sanctification and redemption,

cnv.text: 你們因著　神得以在基督耶穌裡，他使基督成了我們的智慧；就是公義、聖潔和救贖，

ccb.text: 上帝使你们活在基督耶稣里，祂使基督耶稣成为我们的智慧、公义、圣洁和救赎。

csbs.text: 但本于神，你们却是在基督耶稣里的。基督耶稣为我们成了从神而来的智慧、公义、圣洁和救赎，
